FBE-YEARS.title: Years
FBE-YEARS.description: At the start of your turn, if this is in your [gold]Hand[/gold], end your turn and gain an extra turn.
RAINBOW.title: Rainbow
RAINBOW.description:
Gain {Repeat:diff()} Orb Slots, each filled with a random Orb.
At the start of your turn, lose [gold]one of them[/gold].
COOLANT.title: Coolant
COOLANT.description: At the start of your turn, [gold]Channel[/gold] 1 [gold]Frost[/gold].
FBE-INDUSTRY.title: Industry!!!
FBE-INDUSTRY.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Draw until your [gold]Hand[/gold] is full.
Discard the cards drawn this way.
FBE-KEEPING_A_HAND.title: Keeping A Hand
FBE-KEEPING_A_HAND.description: At the end of your turn, randomly [gold]Retain[/gold] {Cards:diff()} of the highest-cost cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
FBE-TIME_FALL.title: Timefall
FBE-TIME_FALL.description: Whenever you apply [gold]Doom[/gold] to an enemy, apply {TimeFallPower:diff()} additional [gold]Doom[/gold].
FBE-DEAD_TISSUE.title: Dead Tissue
FBE-UNLIMITED_BLADE_WORKS.title: Unlimited Blade Works
FBE-UNLIMITED_BLADE_WORKS.description:
[gold]Sovereign Blade[/gold] hits {power:diff()} times. Its total damage is unchanged.
[gold]Forge[/gold] {Forge:diff()}.
FBE-BLOOD_FEUD.title: Blood Feud
FBE-BLOOD_FEUD.description:
[gold]Osty[/gold] deals {OstyDamage:diff()} damage.
If the enemy has [gold]Doom[/gold], [gold]Osty[/gold] attacks {Repeat:diff()} additional times.
FBE-REPATRIATE.title: Repatriator
FBE-HA_DOU_KEN.title: Hadouken
FBE-HA_DOU_KEN.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
At the start of your turn, automatically play this from your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold].
FBE-MASTER_REALITY.title: Master Reality
FBE-MASTER_REALITY.description: Whenever you create a card, [gold]Upgrade[/gold] it.
FBE-GIANT_KILLER.title: Giant Killer
FBE-GIANT_KILLER.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If the target's HP {HasExactHealth:is above [red]{ModifiedHealth}[/red]|[blue]is high enough[/blue]}, deal {Multiplier:diff()} times as much damage.
FBE-AGGREGATE.title: Aggregate
FBE-AGGREGATE.description:
For every {EnergyPerCard:diff()} cards in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold], gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.{InCombat:
(Gain {CalculatedEnergy:energyIcons()})|}
FBE-DEMON.title: Demon
FBE-DEMON.description:
Whenever you gain [gold]Strength[/gold], gain 1 [gold]Demon Form[/gold].{IfUpgraded:show:
Gain 1 [gold]Demon Form[/gold].|}
FBE-INVESTMENT_PROMOTION.title: Investment Promotion
FBE-UNREAL_ENGINE.title: Unreal Engine
FBE-UNREAL_ENGINE.description:
All your cards gain [gold]Ethereal[/gold].
Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} at the start of each turn.
FBE-CRUSADE.title: Crusade
FBE-CRUSADE.description: All players play a random Attack from their [gold]Hands[/gold].
FBE-GENESIS2.title: Genesis
FBE-GENESIS2.description:
At the start of your turn, gain {StarsPerTurn:diff()}{singleStarIcon}.
At the end of your turn, lose all {singleStarIcon}.
FBE-STATIC_DISCHARGE.title: Static Discharge
FBE-SERUM.title: Serum
FBE-SERUM.description:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] all Status and Curse cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} for each card Exhausted.
FBE-THE_D6_CHOICE_CARD.description:
Change [gold]{property}[/gold] to a value from {MinRange} to {MaxRange}.
Current: [blue]{value}[/blue]
FBE-THE_D6_CHOICE_CARD.handSelectionProm: Choose a card in your Hand to modify
FBE-THE_D6.title: The D6
FBE-THE_D6.description: Choose a card in your [gold]Hand[/gold] and [gold]modify[/gold] one of its values.
FBE-THE_D20.title: The D20
FBE-THE_D20.description: Choose a card in your [gold]Hand[/gold] and [gold]modify[/gold] one of its values.
